name: WeChat Article Formatter
description_en: Format markdown articles with bm.md styling and publish them straight to WeChat Official Account drafts via the official API.
description_zh: 用 bm.md 样式排版 markdown 文章,并经官方 API 直接发布到微信公众号草稿。
long_en: Reads a markdown file, uploads local images to the WeChat CDN, rewrites image paths, applies styling, and creates a draft through the WeChat Official Account API.
long_zh: 读取 markdown 文件,把本地图片上传到微信 CDN 并替换路径,套用样式,再经公众号官方 API 创建草稿。
sec_note_en: Requires WeChat Official Account API credentials and uploads your content; scope the credentials and review drafts before publishing.
sec_note_zh: 需要微信公众号 API 凭据并会上传内容;请限定凭据权限,发布前审阅草稿。
